litters.name: Black & Tan Dreams Litter
litters.dam_name: CH Midnight Serenade v. Silver Creek
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, Cardiac normal, DM DNA clear, eyes certified
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM DNA clear, eyes certified
litters.description: Planned black and tan litter from fully health-tested champion parents with stable temperaments and strong conformation. Ideal for families wanting an easy-going companion with show or performance potential.
litters.notes: Priority waitlist for show and performance homes. Pet puppies placed on limited registration with spay/neuter agreement.

litters.name: Spring Blossom Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: OFA Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac echo normal
litters.dam_health_summary: OFA Hips B, Elbows normal, eyes clear, DM carrier
litters.description: Balanced working and show lines focused on biddable temperaments and correct structure. Puppies expected to excel in obedience, rally, and junior handling.
litters.notes: A few show prospect reservations still open. Preference to co-own homes within driving distance for serious show interest.

litters.name: Winter Stars Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, spine normal, DM clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips B, Elbows normal, DM clear, eyes normal
litters.description: Outgoing and people-focused puppies from steady, unflappable parents. Several puppies from previous cross are active therapy dogs.
litters.notes: Two male pet puppies and one performance prospect female currently available.

litters.name: Autumn Legacy Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM carrier, eyes clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal
litters.description: All puppies from this litter have been placed. Information kept online for pedigree reference.
litters.notes: Strong heads and effortless side gait; we are watching several puppies from this cross in the show ring.

litters.name: Summer Showcase Litter
litters.sire_name: MBIS GCHS Iron Knight of Riverside
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal, eyes clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal
litters.description: Top-tier show and performance litter from multi–Best in Show sire and group-winning dam. Bred for serious show homes seeking national-level competition prospects.
litters.notes: Show and performance homes only; co-ownership required on most show puppies.

litters.name: Family Companions Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Preliminary hips good, elbows normal, DM untested
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips B, elbows pending, DM clear
litters.description: Laid-back parents with excellent off-switch and gentle demeanor around children. Ideal for families wanting easy, moderate-energy companions.
litters.notes: No breeding or show homes for this litter; pet/companion placements only.

litters.name: Working Lines Performance Litter
litters.dam_name: BH, IGP1 Ember Flame vom Tal
litters.sire_health_summary: SV Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, LÜW 0
litters.dam_health_summary: SV Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear
litters.description: High-drive working line litter best suited for experienced handlers interested in IGP, PSA, SAR, or detection work.
litters.notes: Performance and working placements only; not recommended for first-time dog owners.

litters.name: Spring Rainbows Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, eyes clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM carrier, eyes clear
litters.description: Versatile, medium-drive litter expected to produce easy-to-live-with dogs suitable for active families and juniors.
litters.notes: Waitlist open with limited show prospect reservations available.

litters.name: City Lights Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips B, elbows normal, DM clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Preliminary hips good, DNA panel pending
litters.description: Moderate-energy, people-oriented pairing suited for suburban and city households with regular exercise.
litters.notes: Health testing on dam will be updated before finalizing reservations.

litters.name: Golden Harvest Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM carrier, eyes clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal
litters.description: Substantial, typey puppies with correct croups and strong toplines. One or two show prospects may become available later.
litters.notes: Currently under evaluation; inquiries welcome for pet and possible show homes.

litters.name: Midnight Magic Litter
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, eyes clear
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips B, Elbows normal, DM clear
litters.description: Elegant, athletic puppies with jet black pigment and ground-covering side gait. Ideal for juniors and active pet homes.
litters.notes: Several puppies ready for new homes now; transport can be arranged to major airports.

litters.name: Heritage Keepers Litter
litters.dam_name: CH Riverside Keeper of the Flame
litters.sire_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, THDN certified therapy dog
litters.dam_health_summary: Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac echo normal
litters.description: Temperament-focused linebreeding on our foundation bitch, aimed at therapy and junior showmanship homes.
litters.notes: Early deposits accepted for therapy and junior show homes. Health guarantees and lifetime breeder support included.

product_categories.name: Apparel
product_categories.description: Kennel-branded t-shirts, hoodies, hats, and other clothing items for handlers and supporters.

product_categories.name: Leashes
product_categories.description: Show leads, everyday leashes, and training lines suitable for puppies and adults.

stud_dogs.name: MBIS GCHS Iron Knight of Riverside
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Linebred 3-3 on multi–BIS CH Silver Creek Guardian, combining strong toplines with effortless side gait.
stud_dogs.description: Powerful, balanced male with iron-strong topline, correct croup, and confident, stable temperament. Produces beautiful heads and outstanding movement.

stud_dogs.name: CH Riverstone Chase the Dream
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Outcross to European lines bringing dark eyes, strong pigment, and outstanding character.
stud_dogs.description: Moderate, typey male with smooth, ground-covering side gait and an incredibly sweet disposition. Excellent choice for improving temperament and front assembly.

stud_dogs.name: CH Midnight Legacy of Riverside
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Combination of American and German show lines with a focus on solid black pigmentation and correct temperament.
stud_dogs.description: Compact, athletic male with a rock-solid temperament. Produces excellent off-switch and easy trainability, ideal for active pet and performance homes.

stud_dogs.name: CH Brave Heart of Riverside
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Sired by MBIS GCHS Iron Knight of Riverside out of a strong-moving GCH dam.
stud_dogs.description: Balanced male with excellent return of upper arm and firm backline. Produces very pretty heads and dark eyes.

stud_dogs.name: Stormcaller Sable Tempest
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Working-line pedigree with IGP-titled ancestors and proven performance offspring.
stud_dogs.description: High-drive working male with outstanding focus and resilience. Best suited for bitches whose owners want performance and sport prospects.

stud_dogs.name: IGP1 Ember Flame vom Tal
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Imported German working lines emphasizing strong nerves and high trainability.
stud_dogs.description: Serious worker with clear on/off switch in the house. Produces high-aptitude puppies for IGP, SAR, and detection work.

stud_dogs.name: GCHB Noble Guardian of Highland
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Group-winning male from a long line of top-producing champions.
stud_dogs.description: Large, masculine male with floating side gait and a very affectionate temperament. Produces big, glamorous puppies with showy ring presence.

stud_dogs.name: CH Silver Creek Highland Echo
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Strong show lines known for effortless movement and longevity.
stud_dogs.description: Easygoing male with beautiful side gait and impressive ring attitude. Produces correct size and lovely expression.

stud_dogs.name: IPO3 Shadow Hunter vom Adler
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Top working pedigree with multiple BSP competitors in the first three generations.
stud_dogs.description: Serious, clear-headed working male with strong grips and excellent tracking. Best used on bitches with stable, confident temperaments.

stud_dogs.name: Highland Echo's Rising Son
stud_dogs.pedigree_summary: Young son of CH Silver Creek Highland Echo out of a GCH dam.
stud_dogs.description: Promising young male just starting his show career. Limited use until full health testing is complete.

products.name: Kennel Logo T-Shirt - Unisex
products.description: Soft unisex crewneck t-shirt featuring the Riverside Kennels logo on the front and website URL on the back. Perfect for shows, classes, and casual wear.
products.options_description: Available in heather black or sport grey, sizes XS–XXL. Classic fit.

products.name: Kennel Logo T-Shirt - Fitted Ladies
products.description: Fitted ladies t-shirt with the Riverside Kennels stacked logo. Slightly tapered cut with cap sleeves.
products.options_description: Runs slightly small; consider sizing up if between sizes.

products.name: Kennel Logo Pullover Hoodie
products.description: Cozy midweight hoodie with large kennel logo on the back and small chest logo. Ideal for chilly show mornings.

products.name: Embroidered Kennel Logo Cap
products.description: Low-profile cotton cap with embroidered Riverside Kennels logo. Adjustable buckle closure.
products.options_description: One size fits most; adjustable metal buckle.

products.name: Show Ring Slip Lead - 4ft
products.description: Lightweight 4-foot slip lead ideal for conformation handling. Fine but strong, with comfortable grip and discreet hardware.
products.options_description: Available in black, tan, and purple. 3/16" diameter.

products.name: Biothane Everyday Leash - 6ft
products.description: Durable 6-foot biothane leash, easy to clean and comfortable to hold. Great for daily walks and training.
products.options_description: 5/8" width with brass hardware. Multiple colors available.

products.name: Soft Rope Leash - 5ft
products.description: Soft cotton-blend rope leash with comfortable hand loop. Great for ring-side potty breaks and casual use.
products.options_description: Brass snap with whipped ends for durability.

products.name: Dual-Clip Training Leash
products.description: Adjustable multi-point leash with clips on both ends, perfect for front-clip harnesses and training setups.
products.options_description: Multiple configuration points for hands-free walking or tethering.

puppies.name: Riverside Midnight Echo
puppies.description: Sweet, people-focused female with a soft temperament and lovely pigment. Best suited for an active pet or therapy prospect home.

puppies.name: Black & Tan Dreams Hero
puppies.description: Elegant, balanced male with pretty head and clean side gait. Promising show prospect with a very biddable temperament.

puppies.name: Black & Tan Dreams Legacy
puppies.description: Confident, outgoing male show prospect with a bit more drive. Would suit a performance or junior handling home.

puppies.name: Black & Tan Dreams Guardian
puppies.description: Heaviest-boned male in the litter with strong head and powerful side gait. Placed as a higher-end show prospect.

puppies.name: Black & Tan Dreams Buddy
puppies.description: Happy, moderate boy suitable as a performance or casual show prospect. Sire is a young male still working toward his championship.

puppies.name: Black & Tan Dreams Starlet
puppies.description: Flashy female with tons of attitude. Reserved for a co-own show home.

puppies.name: Winter Stars Comet
puppies.description: Now placed in a loving family home; listed for pedigree reference only.

puppies.name: Winter Stars Nova
puppies.description: High-drive female currently on breeder's hold for performance evaluation.

puppies.name: Midnight Magic Raven
puppies.description: Athletic girl with excellent toy drive; ideal for obedience, rally, or agility.

puppies.name: Midnight Magic Jet
puppies.description: Easy-going boy going to a companion home with kids; shown here for reference.

puppies.name: Spring Blossom Poppy
puppies.description: Puppy from confirmed Spring Blossom litter. Individual reservations open after evaluations at 7–8 weeks.

puppies.name: Family Companions Daisy
puppies.description: Future pet puppy from our easy-going Family Companions litter. Not intended for show or breeding.

puppies.name: Working Lines Spark
puppies.description: Planned high-drive performance puppy suitable for IGP, SAR, or detection homes only.

puppies.name: Spring Rainbows Hope
puppies.description: Future show or performance prospect from our upcoming Spring Rainbows litter.

events.name: Beginner Conformation Handling Workshop - Los Angeles
events.description: Foundational skills for new handlers covering ring patterns, stacking, gaiting, and ring etiquette. Limited working spots with one dog per participant.

events.name: Intermediate Handling Tune-Up - Anaheim
events.description: For handlers already showing in class or winners. Focus on ring presentation, timing, and polishing footwork for AKC conformation.

events.name: Ringside Confidence Handling Workshop - Burbank
events.description: Small-group handling workshop emphasizing confident gaiting, clean down-and-backs, and stacking under distraction. Ideal prep for juniors and new handlers.

events.name: Advanced Conformation Handling Intensive - San Diego
events.description: Full-afternoon intensive for experienced handlers focusing on breed-specific presentation, judge evaluation, and strategy for majors and specials.

events.name: Summer Handling Skills Refresher - Los Angeles
events.description: Brush up on handling skills before the summer circuit. Includes mock show with feedback from an AKC judge.

events.name: Puppy Kindergarten Group Class
events.description: Six-week group class covering basic manners, socialization, grooming table skills, and intro to stacked stand for show puppies.

events.name: Canine Structure for Performance & Conformation
events.description: Full-day seminar on structure, movement, and evaluating puppies for future performance or conformation potential.

events.name: Windy City Spring Classic Dog Show
events.description: Four-day AKC all-breed dog show with supported entries for multiple working breeds. Riverside Kennels has several dogs entered in conformation.
events.address: 2301 S Jean Baptiste Point DuSable Lake Shore Dr

events.name: Great Lakes Summer Cluster
events.description: Three-day summer cluster with all-breed conformation, NOHS, and junior showmanship. Riverside Kennels is showing multiple class dogs and specials.

events.name: Heartland Working Dog Spectacular
events.description: Specialty weekend for working breeds with sweepstakes and specialty judge panels. Riverside Kennels has class and specials dogs entered.

events.name: Midwest All-Breed Extravaganza
events.description: Large all-breed show weekend drawing entries from across the Midwest. Riverside Kennels is not entered this year.

events.name: Gateway to the West Summer Classic
events.description: St. Louis summer cluster held at the Purina Event Center. Riverside Kennels has a specials dog entered for all four days.

events.name: Chicago Winter Working Dog Show
events.description: Indoor winter show featuring working group specialties. Riverside Kennels usually attends with young prospects.

events.name: Southern California Spring Classic
events.description: AKC all-breed show weekend with NOHS and junior showmanship. Hosted at a large outdoor venue with on-site RV parking.
